productName: Nano Doozies - Peach Mango 3:1 ELEVATE 10 Pk (80g) (300mg CBD;100mg THC)
description: A small-batch soft, juicy peach edible inspired by old family recipes, fancy sugar, and the kind of flavor people talk about after the first bite. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 3:1 ratio. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
